query_normalized: robustness of change‑point detection methods on public financial time series statistics
rationale: The paper presents a novel methodological framework for estimating and inferring multiple change‑points in time‑series regressions, providing theoretical and simulation‑based evidence of its performance. As a foundational methods contribution to change‑point detection (criterion d), it is a canonical reference that any review of robustness of change‑point techniques—including those applied to public financial series—should cite.
